name: Flashcard Generator
description: Generate study flashcards from any topic or material

agents.name: Content Researcher
agents.purpose: Research the topic to create accurate flashcard content
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research the topic. Identify the key concepts, definitions, facts, and relationships that should be memorized.

agents.name: Flashcard Creator
agents.purpose: Create effective flashcards from the research
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create flashcards in Q&A format. Each card should test one concept. Use clear, concise language. Include mnemonics where helpful.

suggestion_card.title: Flashcard Generator
suggestion_card.subtitle: Create study flashcards on any topic

author: agentfactory
